<!-- Thanks for contributing to AI Vault! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New content (notes/pages)
- [ ] Content fix / clarification
- [ ] Site config, theme, or tooling
- [ ] CI / build

## Languages

<!-- Content changes should keep English (primary) and Vietnamese in sync. -->

- [ ] English (`content/en`) updated
- [ ] Vietnamese (`content/vi`) updated
- [ ] N/A (not a content change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint:md` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] Internal links use `{{< relref >}}` and resolve
- [ ] No secrets or personal data committed
